---
name: instructions-generator
agent: instructions-generator
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Takes the information below and generate a [NAME].instrctions.md file for it in the /.github/instruction directory. Generate an appropriate name for the [NAME] placeholder based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. If no instructions is provided below, prompt the user to provide the necessary detail information about the layer of architecture or coding standards to the document. The .md file should have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot of when to use this set of instructions.
